title: stephanomeria malheurensis
intro: Stephanomeria malheurensis is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, known for its unique and attractive appearance. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stephanomeria malheurensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
